_comment: POST /api/v1/applications — register gitopsapi application on gitopsdev
_br005: cluster field becomes targetNamespace in HelmRelease — is this a cluster name or namespace name? BR-005
_curl: curl -s -X POST -H 'Host: gitopsgui.podzone.cloud' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-Forwarded-User: martin' -H 'X-Auth-Request-Groups: build-managers' -d @applications/gitopsapi-create.json http://freyr:8081/api/v1/applications
name: gitopsapi
values_yaml:
image:
  repository: ghcr.io/motttt/gitopsapi
  tag: "latest"
  pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
gitops:
  repoUrl: "git@github.com:your-org/cluster-charts.git"
  branch: main
  githubRepo: "your-org/cluster-charts"
secrets:
  sshKeySecret: gitopsapi-ssh-key
  githubTokenSecret: gitopsapi-github-token
  mgmtKubeconfigSecret: gitopsapi-mgmt-kubeconfig
  ageKeySecret: gitopsapi-age-key
expose:
  hostname: gitopsgui.podzone.cloud
  gatewayName: gateway
  gatewayNamespace: kube-system
  tlsSecretName: gitopsgui-tls
